---
title: "deployment.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/deployment.ts"
loc: 22
complexity: 3
logic_score: 8.60
style_score: 4.52
intel_score: 9.27
overall_score: 7.28
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [execa](file://execa)
- [*](file://chalk)

### Exports
- `deployCandidate`
- `deployCandidate`
